message:
feat: add Doctor Dog health monitor patrol for Dolt server

Implements a 5-minute ticker daemon patrol that performs comprehensive
Dolt server health monitoring:
- TCP connectivity check with 5s timeout, auto-restart on failure
- SELECT 1 latency check, escalate if >2s
- SHOW DATABASES count check against expected max
- dolt gc on each production database (CLI, one at a time, 5m timeout)
- Zombie dolt sql-server process detection and cleanup
- Backup directory staleness check (escalate if >30min old)
- Per-database disk usage check (escalate if >200MB)

All anomalies escalated via gt escalate. Opt-in patrol (disabled by default).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
